mapper.sql: rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname, rv.rating, rv.content, (rv.member_id <=> #{viewerId}) AS isOwner, rv.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM review WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} GROUP BY rating
SELECT FROM review rv JOIN member m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id WHERE rv.review_id = #{reviewId} LIMIT 1
SELECT member_id FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (member_id, recipe_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{cmd.memberId}, #{cmd.recipeId}, #{cmd.rating}, #{cmd.content})
